heading: Review relating to countries subject to comprehensive United States arms embargo

Effective Date of 2021 Amendment, , , provided that the amendment made by section 1081(d)(8) is effective as of , and as if included in .Pub. L. 116–283, div. A, title X, § 1081(d)134 Stat. 3873Pub. L. 115–232Jan. 1, 2021Aug. 13, 2018

children.text: the scope of controls under title 15, Code of Federal Regulations, that apply to exports, reexports, and in-country transfers for military end uses and military end users in countries that are subject to a comprehensive United States arms embargo and countries that are subject to a United Nations arms embargo; and

entries on the Commerce Control List maintained under title 15, Code of Federal Regulations, that are not subject to a license requirement for the export, reexport, or in-country transfer of items to countries subject to a comprehensive United States arms embargo.

children.heading: Implementation of results of review
children.label: b Implementation of results of review
children.text: Not later than 270 days after , the Secretary shall implement the results of the review conducted under subsection (a).August 13, 2018
